# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Give users a cleaner, more trustworthy confirmation experience before destructive actions.

## Success Criteria

- Project deletion uses an in-app modal instead of the browser confirm dialog.
- The modal clearly explains the action and supports cancel/confirm.
- The component is reusable for future confirmations.

## UX Notes

- Keep it visually aligned with the current app style.
- Destructive action should be clear but not loud.
- The modal should feel simple and calm.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Over-generalizing the first version would add unnecessary complexity.
